Claude Opus 4.6.question: 公司ID为859的公司一共有多少套房源？
Claude Opus 4.6.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(cnt) AS total_housing_count
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_lease.qft_whole_housing
    WHERE company_id = 859 AND is_delete = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_lease.qft_joint_housing
    WHERE company_id = 859 AND is_delete = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_lease.qft_focus_parent_room
    WHERE company_id = 859 AND is_delete = 0
) t;

Claude Opus 4.6.question: 本月应收租金总额是多少？

FROM (
    -- 集中式应收租金
    SELECT SUM(fi.final_money) AS total_income
    FROM finance.qft_focus_tenants_income fi
    WHERE fi.is_delete = 0
      AND fi.is_deposit = 0
      AND fi.start_valid_date < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND fi.end_valid_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND fi.is_history = 0

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租/整租应收租金
    SELECT SUM(ji.final_money) AS total_income

      AND ji.start_valid_date < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND ji.end_valid_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')

Claude Opus 4.6.question: 逾期未缴费的租客有哪些？列出姓名和欠费金额

SELECT 
    t.tenants_name AS 姓名,
    SUM(s.debt_money) AS 欠费金额
FROM lease.qft_joint_tenants_sub_income s
JOIN lease.qft_joint_tenants t ON s.tenants_id = t.id
WHERE s.is_delete = 0
  AND s.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND s.collection_date < CURDATE()
  AND s.debt_money > 0
  AND t.is_delete = 0
GROUP BY t.id, t.tenants_name

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    t.tenants_name AS 姓名,
    SUM(i.debt_money) AS 欠费金额
FROM finance.qft_focus_tenants_income i
JOIN lease.qft_focus_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id
WHERE i.is_delete = 0
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND i.collection_date < CURDATE()
  AND i.debt_money > 0
  AND t.is_delete = 0
GROUP BY t.id, t.name

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    t.tenants_name AS 姓名,
    SUM(p.debt_money) AS 欠费金额

  AND t.is_delete = 0
GROUP BY t.id, t.tenants_name

    s.name AS store_name,
    COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.room_is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate
FROM lease.qft_room_query_summary_table r
JOIN basics.qft_store s ON r.housing_store_id = s.id
WHERE r.room_is_delete = 0

SELECT

    t.tenants_name,
    t.phone,
    -- 账单信息
    i.id AS income_id,
    i.business_type,
    i.pay_count,
    i.is_deposit,
    i.start_valid_date,
    i.end_valid_date,
    i.pay_money,
    i.final_money,
    i.real_money AS income_real_money,
    i.debt_money,
    i.pay_status,
    i.collection_date,
    -- 子账单信息
    si.id AS sub_income_id,
    si.sub_income_name,
    si.sub_income_type,
    si.pay_money AS sub_pay_money,
    si.final_money AS sub_final_money,
    si.real_money AS sub_real_money,
    si.debt_money AS sub_debt_money,
    si.pay_status AS sub_pay_status,
    si.late_fee_money AS sub_late_fee,
    -- 财务流水信息
    f.id AS finance_id,
    f.serial_number,
    f.nature,
    f.money AS finance_money,
    f.account_date,
    f.cashier,
    f.audit,
    f.source_type,
    f.finance_abstract,
    -- 流水明细信息
    fi.id AS finance_item_id,
    fi.bill_code,
    fi.bill_item_code,
    fi.classify AS item_classify,
    fi.cause AS item_cause,
    fi.trade_money,
    fi.real_money AS item_real_money,
    fi.late_money,
    fi.deduction_type
FROM lease.qft_joint_tenants t
-- 关联应收账单
LEFT JOIN finance.qft_joint_tenants_income i 
    ON i.tenants_id = t.id 
    AND i.is_delete = 0
-- 关联子账单
LEFT JOIN lease.qft_joint_tenants_sub_income si 
    ON si.income_id = i.id 
    AND si.tenants_id = t.id 
    AND si.is_delete = 0
-- 关联财务流水
LEFT JOIN finance.qft_finance f 
    ON f.tenant_id = t.id 
    AND f.is_delete = 0
-- 关联流水明细
LEFT JOIN finance.qft_finance_item fi 
    ON fi.finance_id = f.id 
    AND fi.is_delete = 0
WHERE t.is_delete = 0
    AND t.company_id = ?
    AND t.id = ?
ORDER BY i.pay_count ASC, si.sub_income_type ASC, f.account_date DESC;

  AND jh.is_delete = 0
  AND s.is_delete = 0
  AND s.name = '${门店名称}'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
    wt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    wt.phone AS 租客电话,
    wh.housing_name AS 房东姓名,
    wh.housing_phone AS 房东电话,
    wh.housing_other_phone AS 房东其他电话,
    s.name AS 门店名称,
    '整租' AS 业务类型
FROM lease.qft_joint_tenants_sub_income si
JOIN lease.qft_whole_tenants wt ON si.tenants_id = wt.id
JOIN lease.qft_whole_housing wh ON si.housing_id = wh.id
JOIN basics.qft_store s ON si.store_id = s.id
WHERE si.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND si.is_delete = 0
  AND si.end_valid_date < CURDATE()
  AND wt.is_delete = 0
  AND wh.is_delete = 0
  AND s.is_delete = 0
  AND s.name = '${门店名称}']
